content.text: I'll decode this frame to extract the EngineSpeed and message name.
EngineSpeed decoded as 1500 rpm from the J1939_EEC1_ElectronicEngineControl1 message (PGN 61444). Since this is a reported sensor value (not an actuation command), let me verify it's within bounds.
EngineSpeed is 1500 rpm (WITHIN bounds [0, 2700]), decoded from the J1939_EEC1_ElectronicEngineControl1 message (PGN 61444).
